nasb.text: For a command came to me by the word of the Lord, ‘You shall eat no bread, nor drink water there; do not return by going the way which you came.’ ”

esv.text: for it was said to me by the word of the Lord, ‘You shall neither eat bread nor drink water there, nor return by the way that you came.’”

cnv.text: 因為有耶和華的話對我說：‘你在那裡不可吃飯喝水，也不可從你去的原路回來。’”

ccb.text: 因为耶和华吩咐我不可在这里用饭喝水，也不可原路返回。”
